rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF C'EAYSIA CHANICE ALBERTI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Continued to August 6, 2014 for proper notice. As stated in the first tentative ruling, Rule 3.1362 has specific requirements for notice (see subsection d). The proof of service filed does not show that Counsel sent a copy of the declaration in support of the attorney's motion and the proposed order as required and no declaration was filed re the address used for notice. New notice must be given and new proof of service filed, along with the required declaration re the address used.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: BJ HERRAN REVOCABLE TR ESTABLISHED 4/13/2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Charles Odenthals Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is overruled as to the first and second causes of action of the Second Amended Complaint. The prevailing party shall prepare the order. Should Respondent Charles Odenthal wish to contest the ruling, he shall contact the court and opposing counsel no later than 3:30 p.m. on 7/15.
